lessons: Boustrophedon pattern works: generate east-west row waypoints alternating direction, 1m spacing, stay 0.5m from walls
Drive at 0.45 m/s for maximum coverage speed. Slower wastes time, faster causes overshoot
Proportional heading control (error * 0.03) works well for smooth steering
When obstacle detected at front < 0.6m, arc around it while continuing forward progress
Track visited_cells = set((int(round(x)), int(round(y)))) to measure coverage
If stuck (velocity near zero for 20+ ticks), back up and turn 90 degrees to recover
